nodes.name: 莫桑比克
nodes.summary: 莫桑比克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联154种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Shelley's francolin、Natal spurfowl等154种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Euplectes

nodes.name: Zanzibar red bishop
nodes.summary: The Zanzibar red bishop (Euplectes nigroventris) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in Kenya, Mozambique, and Tanzania. References External links Zanzibar bishop on Weaver Watch
